rules.rule: Guest users cannot view or initiate funding operations.
Trader users can initiate funding only for trading accounts owned by the same customer identity.
Partner users cannot initiate client deposit, withdrawal, or transfer in V1.
Withdrawal and internal transfer require approved KYC.
Deposit may be submitted before KYC approval, but credited funds can be restricted by risk rules until KYC is approved.
Funding mutations require active trading accounts; demo, readOnly, disabled, and archived accounts are blocked.
Internal transfer is only allowed between same-owner USD trading accounts and cannot use the same source and target account.
Deposit and withdrawal payment methods must be available, configured for the operation, and outside maintenance.
All funding operations must validate configured minAmount, maxAmount, dailyLimit, monthlyLimit, feeType, feeAmount, and fxRateSource before submission.
IDR/USD conversion must use a non-expired FX quote and display expected and actual USD settlement amounts.
Transactions with amount mismatch, ownership mismatch, velocity anomaly, provider failure, limit exception, or AML hit must enter manual review.
Every state transition must create an audit log with actor, reason, previousStatus, nextStatus, timestamp, and requestId.
All mutation APIs must include idempotencyKey, clientRequestId, riskAcknowledged, and auditContext.
Existing demo balances and demo transactions must not be represented as real withdrawable funds.
Local PIN is optional by default; login, registration, and product entry flows must not require PIN setup or unlock unless the user explicitly enables PIN from security settings.
